ClassId.description: The class id, a block of schedules

ClassDescriptionId.description: Used only internally, overridden if sent

LocationId.description: The location where the class is taking place

StartDate.description: Class start time (use null for TBD)

EndDate.description: Class end time (ignored if StartTime is null)

StartTime.description: Class start time (use null for TBD)

EndTime.description: Class end time (ignored if StartTime is null)

DaySunday.description: (optional) - If the class occurs on Sunday (ignored if EndDate is null)

DayMonday.description: (optional) - If the class occurs on Monday (ignored if EndDate is null)

DayTuesday.description: (optional) - If the class occurs on Tuesday (ignored if EndDate is null)

DayWednesday.description: (optional) - If the class occurs on Wednesday (ignored if EndDate is null)

DayThursday.description: (optional) - If the class occurs on Thursday (ignored if EndDate is null)

DayFriday.description: (optional) - If the class occurs on Friday (ignored if EndDate is null)

DaySaturday.description: (optional) - If the class occurs on Saturday (ignored if EndDate is null

StaffId.description: The staff member teaching the class

ResourceId.description: (optional) - The room where the class is taking place

WebCapacity.description: How many people can signup online (if 0 clients cannot signup online)

AllowOpenEnrollment.description: Allow clients to choose which sessions they'd like to sign up for

AllowDateForwardEnrollment.description: Allow booking after the enrollment has started

RetainScheduleChanges.description: Whether or not to retain manual schedule changes within the date range
